examples: This led them to believe that the cells in the early embryo are undetermined in the sense that each cell has the potential to develop in a variety of different ways.
The cause of his illness and death remain undetermined.
The data cleansing service receives data with an undetermined level of data quality as input.
Then there is the ultimate swan, color undetermined, of a massive revolution in energy physics.
An undetermined number of Somalis, thought to be in the hundreds, were killed in the fighting.
